description: Natoma is a platform for connecting AI clients and agents to enterprise applications and data sources with centralized governance, authorization, and auditability. It supports managed and custom MCP server deployment and distributes access to users through connections and profiles.
summary: Natoma exposes a documented managed MCP integration surface for connecting AI clients to enterprise tools; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI surface was found on natomahq.com or Natoma-owned subdomains in the reviewed docs.
